summary: Completed full testing of ORIENTATION FIELD feature (collective navigation layer). Backend APIs (/api/orientation/field and /api/orientation/user/{user_id}) working correctly. Frontend displays collective center marker, legend, field insight, and alignment score (when user has data).
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: /api/orientation/field endpoint returns field_center with x,y coordinates correctly
GOOD: /api/orientation/user/{user_id} returns user_position, collective_center, alignment_score, and insights
GOOD: OrientationCompassSection.js fetches collectiveData from API and calculates driftInfo
GOOD: Collective center marker (violet dot) rendered with data-testid='collective-center'
GOOD: Legend displays 'מרכז קולקטיבי' when collective data available
GOOD: Field insight text displays below compass from collectiveData.field_insight
GOOD: Alignment score section shows percentage with color coding (green >70%, amber >40%, red <40%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orientation Field feature fully tested. Backend returns 79 users with field_center at coordinates (32.7, 63.1) which maps to recovery quadrant. Frontend correctly displays violet dot for collective center, dashed zone circle, and field insight text. Alignment score only visible when user has history data.

frontend_tests.collective_field_insight_displayed: PASS - 'השדה הקולקטיבי מראה נטייה חזקה להתאוששות ומתייצב.'
frontend_tests.alignment_score_with_user_data: PASS - Shows percentage when user has history
